allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) on port $\($_.LocalPort\)" })

PowerShell(cd d:\\notion-style-portfolio; $env:NODE_ENV = "development"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","dev" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\dev-out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\dev-err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\dev-out.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 20; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\dev-err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String "error|Error|ready|Ready" | Select-Object -Last 10)
PowerShell(cd d:\\notion-style-portfolio; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "seo|SEO" } | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell(cd d:\\notion-style-portfolio; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "aeo|geo|AEO|GEO" } | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell(cd d:\\notion-style-portfolio; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "visibility|aeo-audit|geo-audit|seo-audit" } | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell(cd d:\\notion-style-portfolio; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "visibility|aeo-audit|geo-audit|seo-audit|generate\\.ts|settings\\.ts|router\\.ts|ai-settings" } | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(cd d:\\notion-style-portfolio; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "visibility|aeo-audit|geo-audit|seo-audit|generate\\.ts|settings\\.ts|router\\.ts|ai-settings|base\\.ts" } | Select-Object -First 30)
